# Daily Report — 2026-07-15

## Task Completed
Added `list_on_call_rotation_members` tool that lists `cmn_rota_member` records
for a given on-call rotation. Accepts the rotation by sys_id or exact name, with
optional active-state filter and pagination. Results are ordered by the member
`order` field and include the member user, rotation reference, skills, catch_all,
override flag, and timestamps — all reference fields normalised to display values.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 2271
- Coverage: 93% total; on_call_tools.py 100%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System-level packages (setuptools 68.1.2, urllib3 2.6.3, wheel 0.42.0) have known
CVEs but are not project dependencies. Project code is clean.

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/on_call_tools.py` — added `ON_CALL_ROTA_MEMBER_TABLE`, `ON_CALL_ROTA_MEMBER_FIELDS`, `ListOnCallRotationMembersParams`, `_format_on_call_rotation_member`, `list_on_call_rotation_members`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — imported and exported `list_on_call_rotation_members`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + tool, registered entry
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `list_on_call_rotation_members` to `system_administrator` and `full` packages
- `tests/test_on_call_tools.py` — 25 new tests for `_format_on_call_rotation_member` and `list_on_call_rotation_members`
